name: I fell at work a week ago but didn't tell anyone because I thought I was fine—did I ruin my claim?
description: Not necessarily, but you must report it in writing immediately. Delays give insurance companies an excuse to deny your claim by arguing the injury didn't happen

mainEntity.name: I fell at work a week ago but didn't tell anyone because I thought I was fine—did I ruin my claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Not necessarily, but you must report it in writing immediately. Delays give insurance companies an excuse to deny your claim by arguing the injury didn't happen at work.
